**Generated by:** full-wiring-spec audit
**Source files:** `ChatView.swift`, `ChatInputBar.swift`, `ModeInfoCard.swift`, `ModeSelector.swift`, `ThinkingMode.swift`, `TradeGuruColors.swift`, `ViewModels/ChatViewModel.swift`, `Models/ChatMessage.swift`, `Models/Conversation.swift`, `Models/ContentBlock.swift`, `Models/MockData.swift`, `Services/TradeGuruAPI.swift`, `Services/APIConfig.swift`, `Services/StreamParser.swift`, `Services/DeviceManager.swift`, `Views/MessageBubble.swift`, `Views/SidebarView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/TextBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/StepListView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/WarningCardView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/CodeBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/PartsListView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/RegulationView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/TableBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/CalloutView.swift`

---

## Instructions

This document tracks every interactive element on the **Chat** screen.

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `wired` | Has real logic — action does something |
| `empty` | Action closure is `{}` or value goes nowhere |
| `needs-backend` | Requires additional API call, processing, or persistence |
| `decorative` | Visual only — no logic needed |
| `removed` | Was in previous scan, no longer found |

## Buttons

| # | Name | SF Symbol | File | Line | Status | Current Logic | Backend Needed |
|---|------|-----------|------|------|--------|---------------|----------------|
| 1 | Hamburger menu | `line.3.horizontal` | `ChatView.swift` | 113 | wired | Sets `showSidebar = true` with animation, opens SidebarView overlay | NO |
| 2 | New chat | `square.and.pencil` | `ChatView.swift` | 126 | wired | Calls `viewModel.newConversation(mode:)` — creates new Conversation, inserts at top | NO (needs-backend for persistence) |
| 3 | Mode card dismiss (X) | `xmark` | `ModeInfoCard.swift` | 29 | wired | Calls `onDismiss` closure -> sets `showModeCard = false` | NO |
| 4 | Fault Finder mode tab | `bolt.fill` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .faultFinder`, mode passed to API via `viewModel.send()` | NO — mode already sent in API payload |
| 5 | Learn mode tab | `book.fill` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .learn` | NO |
| 6 | Research mode tab | `magnifyingglass` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .research` | NO |
| 7 | Send message | `arrow.up.circle.fill` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 75 | wired | Calls `onSend?(text, nil)`, clears text. ChatView closure calls `viewModel.send()` which calls `TradeGuruAPI.chat()` SSE stream | YES — always passes `nil` for attachments even when photo selected |
| 8 | Attachment cancel | `plus` (rotated 45deg) | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 24 | wired | Sets `attachmentActive = false`, clears `selectedItem` | NO |

| 1 | Message text field | `TextField("Ask TradeGuru")` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 58 | wired | `$text` — multiline 1-5 lines. Value passed to `onSend` closure -> `viewModel.send()` -> `TradeGuruAPI.chat()` | NO — fully wired to real API |
| 2 | Photo picker | `PhotosPicker` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 40 | needs-backend | `$selectedItem` — selects image/video, sets `attachmentActive`. But selected item is NEVER loaded as Data, never converted to `MessageAttachment`, never passed to `onSend` | YES — data loading, attachment creation, vision API integration |

| 4 | DeviceManager | `Services/DeviceManager.swift` | wired | Keychain-based device ID persistence |

## Missing Features (not present in any file)

| # | Feature | Endpoint | Status | Notes |
|---|---------|----------|--------|-------|
| 1 | Voice input button | `/audio/transcribe` | needs-backend | No mic button in ChatInputBar, API method exists in TradeGuruAPI |
| 2 | Text-to-speech playback | `/audio/speech` | needs-backend | API method exists, no playback UI |
| 3 | Rating UI | `/rating` | needs-backend | `rateLastResponse()` exists in ViewModel, no UI trigger |
| 4 | Feedback/flag UI | `/feedback` | needs-backend | `TradeGuruAPI.feedback()` exists, no UI trigger |
| 5 | File upload flow | `/files/upload` | needs-backend | `TradeGuruAPI.uploadFile()` exists, never called |
| 6 | Streaming progress indicator | N/A | needs-backend | `isStreaming`/`streamingBlocks` exist, no UI rendering |
| 7 | Error state display | N/A | needs-backend | `error` property exists, no UI rendering |
